description: Universal inter-agent communication bus. File-based JSONL. Zero dependencies. Multi-project, multi-terminal.

identity.rule: Every terminal MUST have a unique COMMS_AGENT. Agent name alone is not enough — two gemini terminals on different projects need different sessions.

message_schema.type: task | status | result | error | handoff | ack | phone-home | clock-in | clock-out

signx.signx-intel: SignX intelligence — bid scoring, customer dossiers, market analysis
signx.signx-warehouse: SignX warehouse — DuckDB, labor data, benchmarking
signx.signx-takeoff: SignX takeoff — estimation engine, ABC, material calc

erp.keyedin: KeyedIn ERP — GWT extraction, report parsing, cost data
erp.kimco: Kimco ERP — API integration, migration, OAuth

agent_behavior.philosophy: Run this like a business. Agents are employees. They clock in, do work, report results, ask for more. No hand-holding.

states.WORKING: Do your task. No chatter until you have something to report.
states.DONE: Phone home immediately. type=phone-home, msg=what you accomplished.
states.BLOCKED: Phone home immediately. type=phone-home, data.blocked_on=what you need.
states.ERROR: Phone home immediately. type=error, data.error=what broke.
states.IDLE: Never sit idle. Read the masterplan or phone home: 'idle - ready for work'.

rules: Every terminal clocks in on startup: comms clock-in 'role'
Every terminal clocks out on exit: comms clock-out
No agent should ever be idle without the boss knowing.
Phone home when done OR blocked. Don't wait to be asked.
If you finish early, check masterplan or ask what's next.
Status updates only when meaningful. No 'still working on it' noise.
Use project channels for project work. General for cross-project coordination.
agent_behavior.masterplan: If data.masterplan_path is set in a task, read it for your next assignment.

cli: comms.sh — source it or call directly. See comms help.
onboarding: Setup: export COMMS_AGENT='agent/session' && source C:/tools/agent-comms/comms.sh && comms clock-in 'your role'. Then: comms send channel 'message'. Phone home when done or blocked. Never sit idle.
